entity.summary: Canton Network mainnet spot order-book exchange operated by Temple Digital Group, exposing production markets and quote-side trading volume through a public exchange-listing API.
entity.notes: Current first-party Temple Digital Group infrastructure exposes a production exchange ticker API for mainnet-enabled Lightspeed markets on Canton. The public listing surface identifies active spot markets and current quote-side volume. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, or corporate registration claim is asserted.

evidence.title: Temple Digital Group official website
evidence.notes: First-party organization domain for Temple Digital Group and its digital-asset trading infrastructure.

evidence.title: Temple Lightspeed public exchange ticker API
evidence.notes: First-party production exchange-listing API exposes current mainnet-enabled Temple Lightspeed spot markets, ticker identifiers, base and target assets, and quote-side volume.
